headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Drops Amid Tech Sell-Off, Oil Climbs To $100 On Hormuz Drama
summary: Tech stocks slide as OpenAI's user growth miss reignites AI capex skepticism, while oil rallies above $99 and the Fed's two-day meeting kicks off.
